test_cases.description: Verify superadmin account has access to the edit button on admin invoice.
test_cases.expected_result: Edit button is visible and clickable for superadmin.
test_cases.actual_result: Edit button rendered and was clickable for the superadmin account, as expected.

test_cases.description: Verify a non-superadmin account explicitly registered/whitelisted by Mark also has edit access.
test_cases.expected_result: Edit button is visible and clickable for the whitelisted account.
test_cases.actual_result: Whitelisted non-superadmin account was able to view and click the edit button as expected.
test_cases.comments: Confirms whitelist permission is honored correctly.

test_cases.description: Verify a regular admin/non-whitelisted account does NOT have access to the edit button.
test_cases.expected_result: Edit button is not visible or is disabled/hidden for this account.
test_cases.actual_result: Edit button was hidden/disabled for the non-whitelisted account; no edit action available via UI.

test_cases.description: Verify an authorized user can successfully edit the invoice description (happy path).
test_cases.expected_result: Description updates successfully and the new value is reflected on the invoice view.
test_cases.actual_result: Description was updated and the new value displayed correctly on the invoice view after save.

test_cases.description: Verify an authorized user can successfully edit the invoice payment date (happy path).
test_cases.expected_result: Payment date updates successfully and reflects correctly in the Payment Date column.
test_cases.actual_result: Payment date was updated and reflected correctly in the Payment Date column.

test_cases.description: Verify Payment Date column shows the correct date for manually paid invoices.
test_cases.expected_result: Payment Date column shows the correct, accurate payment date for the manual payment.
test_cases.actual_result: Payment Date column displayed the correct payment date matching the manual payment record.

test_cases.description: Verify Payment Date column shows the correct date for online-paid invoices.
test_cases.expected_result: Payment Date column shows the correct, accurate payment date for the online payment, consistent with manual payment display.
test_cases.actual_result: Payment Date column displayed the correct online payment date, consistent with the manual payment display format.

test_cases.description: Verify system behavior when description is cleared and saved (empty/blank field validation).
test_cases.expected_result: System blocks save with a validation message, or handles blank description per defined business rule. No crash or broken UI.
test_cases.actual_result: System handled the blank description per the defined business rule; no crash or broken UI encountered.

test_cases.description: Verify system handles edge-case date values (e.g. future date, invalid format) for Payment Date edit.
test_cases.expected_result: System validates input appropriately - rejects invalid dates with a clear message or accepts valid future dates. No system error or crash.
test_cases.actual_result: System validated edge-case date inputs appropriately; no system error or crash occurred.

test_cases.description: Verify a non-authorized user cannot edit invoice by bypassing UI (e.g. direct link, dev tools, replayed request) even if edit button is hidden.
test_cases.expected_result: System blocks the edit action server-side and returns an appropriate access-denied response.
test_cases.actual_result: Replayed PATCH request from a non-whitelisted account's session was rejected server-side with an access-denied response; the invoice description was not modified.
test_cases.comments: Server-side enforcement confirmed independent of UI restriction.

test_cases.description: Verify description field properly handles special characters and long text input.
test_cases.expected_result: Description saves and displays correctly without breaking layout, encoding issues, or script execution.
test_cases.actual_result: Description field accepted special characters and long text input; saved and displayed correctly with no layout breakage or encoding issues.
test_cases.comments: No script execution observed; input handled safely.

test_cases.description: Verify the edit button also shows on invoices paid via online payment (not just manual) for authorized users.
test_cases.expected_result: Edit button is visible and clickable on the online-paid invoice, same as on manually-paid invoices.
test_cases.actual_result: Edit button was visible and clickable on the online-paid invoice, consistent with manually-paid invoices.

test_cases.description: Verify an authorized user can edit the payment date on an invoice that was paid online.
test_cases.expected_result: Payment date updates successfully and reflects correctly in the Payment Date column for the online-paid invoice.
test_cases.actual_result: Payment date was updated successfully and reflected correctly in the Payment Date column for the online-paid invoice.

test_cases.description: Verify that without any manual edit, the Payment Date column auto-populates correctly for a newly completed online payment.
test_cases.expected_result: Payment Date column automatically shows the correct online payment date without requiring manual edit.
test_cases.actual_result: Payment Date column auto-populated with the correct online payment date without requiring any manual edit.
